---
description: Build the next roadmap items end-to-end
---

Use `@builder` to continue implementation from memory and roadmap.

Checklist:
1. Read `.github/memory/context.md`, `.github/memory/roadmap.md`, and `.github/memory/decisions.md` (if present).
2. Pick the next logical 🔲 tasks.
3. **Feature Spec Gate:** If the tasks are new features, check `.github/feature-specs/` for an approved spec. If none exists, create one and ask for human approval BEFORE implementing. Skip for bug fixes or trivial changes.
4. Implement in small, maintainable changes.
5. Compile/validate (LESS, template integrity, JSON validity).
6. Update memory files and feature spec status with completed work and next actions.

If blocked, report blocker and propose the smallest safe next step.
